property.name: java.library.path
property.value:
C:\Program Files\Java\jdk-21 in;C:\Windows\Sun\Java in;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;c:\Users runo\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\debugCommand;c:\Users runo\AppData\Roaming\Code\User\globalStorage\github.copilot-chat\copilotCli;C:\Program Files (x86)\VMware\VMware Workstation in\;C:\Program Files\Common Files\Oracle\Java\javapath;C:\Windows\system32;C:\Windows;C:\Windows\System32\Wbem;C:\Windows\System32\WindowsPowerShell\v1.0\;C:\Windows\System32\OpenSSH\;C:\Program Files\NVIDIA Corporation\NVIDIA app\NvDLISR;C:\Program Files (x86)\NVIDIA Corporation\PhysX\Common;C:\Program Files\PuTTY\;C:\Program Files\dotnet\;C:\Program Files\Git\cmd;C:\Program Files
odejs\;C:\workspace\apache-maven-3.9.11 in;C:\Users runo\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python311\Scripts\;C:\Users runo\AppData\Local\Programs\Python\Python311\;C:\Users runo\AppData\Local\Microsoft\WindowsApps;C:\Users runo\AppData\Local\Programs\Microsoft VS Code in;C:\Users runo\AppData\Local\Programs\Ollama;C:\Program Files\JetBrains\IntelliJ IDEA 2025.2.1 in;C:\Users runo\AppData\Local\GitHubDesktop in;C:\Users runo\AppData\Roaming
pm;C:\Users runo\AppData\Local\Programs\mongosh\;C:\Program Files\MongoDB\Server\8.2 in;c:\Users runo\.vscode\extensions\vscjava.vscode-java-debug-0.59.0 undled\scripts
oConfigScripts;.

testcase.name: obtenerPedidoPorId_shouldReturnPedido
obtenerPedidoPorId_shouldReturnEmptyOnError
testcase.system-err: Error HTTP al obtener pedido: 404 NOT_FOUND, body: {"error":"not found"} Error al buscar pedido por ID 99: Error al obtener pedido: {"error":"not found"} java.lang.RuntimeException: Error al obtener pedido: {"error":"not found"} at com.example.PagoFactura.WebClient.PedidoClient.lambda$obtenerPedidoPorId$1(PedidoClient.java:35) Suppressed: The testcase.name: obtenerPedidoPorId_shouldHandleInvalidJsonGracefully
testcase.system-err: Error al buscar pedido por ID 2: JSON decoding error: Unrecognized token 'not': was expecting (JSON String, Number, Array, Object or token 'null', 'true' or 'false') org.springframework.core.codec.DecodingException: JSON decoding error: Unrecognized token 'not': was expecting (JSON String, Number, Array, Object or token 'null', 'true' or 'false') at
